heading: Preservation of any area as wilderness; study and report to President; procedure for designation of any area as a wilderness
label: 459h–7 Preservation of any area as wilderness; study and report to President; procedure for designation of any area as a wilderness
text: Within four years from , the Secretary of the Interior shall review the area within the Gulf Islands National Seashore and shall report to the President, in accordance with subsections (c) and (d) of , and recommend as to the suitability or nonsuitability of any area within the seashore for preservation as wilderness, and any designation of any such area as a wilderness shall be accomplished in accordance with said subsections.January 8, 1971section 1132 of this title
